response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with a strong testing culture and some distributed systems exposure, but he falls critically short of the role's core requirements. The position demands 8 years of C++ experience as its primary technical qualification; Bogdan's C++ usage appears limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project. His career has been overwhelmingly TypeScript, Node.js, and D-lang focused, with no evidence of cloud compute platform work, hardware architecture, or storage systems experience. There is also no formal technical leadership track record that maps to a Tech Lead scope.
strengths: Consistent application of software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) across multiple employers
Demonstrated distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency D-lang services
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects showing a mentoring disposition
concerns: C++ proficiency is effectively absent — the role mandates 8 years minimum; the resume shows only a 6-month stint and a thesis project
No cloud compute platform, storage architecture, or hardware-adjacent infrastructure experience; work is primarily web and SaaS application development
No evidence of holding a formal technical leadership role with cross-team alignment, roadmap ownership, or engineering-wide architectural responsibility
